evidence_items.content: Travel reimbursement requires: (1) completed T-01 form, (2) original receipts, (3) manager approval for expenses over $500.
Employees must submit travel reimbursement requests within 30 days of trip completion.

assembled_context:
[col-finance-policy] doc-travel-policy-v3 p.4 Reimbursement Procedure:
Travel reimbursement requires: (1) completed T-01 form, (2) original receipts, (3) manager approval for expenses over $500.

[col-hr-policy] doc-hr-handbook-v2 p.12 Travel Policy:
Employees must submit travel reimbursement requests within 30 days of trip completion.
